title: PAN 200 120 Black & White Roll Film
features: FILM TYPE: Professional black & white negative film with ISO 200 speed rating, ideal for versatile shooting conditions
FORMAT: Standard 120 roll film format compatible with medium format cameras, offering high-quality image capture
CHARACTERISTICS: Fine grain structure and excellent tonal range make it perfect for portrait and landscape photography
DEVELOPMENT: Traditional black & white processing compatible with standard developers and darkroom techniques
STORAGE: Individual roll comes in a protective light-tight container with detailed processing information
description: Kentmere Pan 200 is a versatile black and white 35mm film that delivers excellent results for both general-purpose photography and creative expression. This medium-speed film offers an outstanding balance of fine grain, sharpness, and tonal range, making it ideal for various lighting conditions. With its 36-exposure capacity, this film provides ample opportunities to capture meaningful moments with classic monochromatic beauty. The film's ISO 200 speed rating makes it particularly well-suited for outdoor photography in moderate lighting, street photography, and architectural shots. Its forgiving exposure latitude allows both experienced film photographers and newcomers to achieve satisfying results. The film's consistent performance and reliable quality make it a practical choice for photographers who appreciate the timeless aesthetic of black and white photography. Perfect for both personal projects and documentary work, Kentmere Pan 200 continues the tradition of classic film photography in the modern era.
